policy.sync_complete_with_known_unsupported: Passes only when no missing, stale, unknown, or untested rows remain; justified unsupported/fallback rows are allowed.
policy.full_claude_parity: Fails while any unsupported, fallback, untested, degraded, stale, unknown, or missing row remains.

runtime_limitations: Notification idle_prompt has no proven Codex runtime parity and is reported unsupported-runtime.
SubagentStop is a Claude lifecycle concept here; Codex coverage is reported as fallback unless runtime evidence proves native equivalence.

Claude TodoWrite remains required in Claude Code. In Codex compatibility runtime, update_plan is accepted as the TodoWrite-equivalent checklist path only when the runtime exposes update_plan to hooks; it must match canonical steps and one-step-at-a-time transitions. If the runtime does not expose update_plan to legacy hooks, the compatibility gate persists the canonical first-call checklist state on the next hook-visible tool, and Stop enforcement remains the hard final guard.
